entries.title: UseTransition for non-blocking UI updates
entries.summary: Learn how to update your React application's UI without blocking user input.

entries.title: Using Discriminated Unions for Safer State Machines
entries.summary: Discriminated unions provide a safe way to model loading, success, and error states for UI components using a single union type and exhaustive switch.

entries.title: Promise.allSettled for Resilient Parallel Requests
entries.summary: Use Promise.allSettled to handle partial failures in parallel API calls without resorting to try/catch spaghetti.

entries.title: Group Arrays with Object.groupBy in JavaScript
entries.summary: Use Object.groupBy to transform flat arrays into grouped records without manual reduce boilerplate.
